name: webctx
description: Browser-based element selection, click automation, and screenshotting tool for agentic web app improvement

scripts.build: tsup && cp electron/toolbar.html dist/electron/toolbar.html && cp electron/sidebar.html dist/electron/sidebar.html && cp electron/terminal.html dist/electron/terminal.html && cp node_modules/@xterm/xterm/css/xterm.css dist/electron/xterm.css && cp node_modules/@xterm/xterm/lib/xterm.js dist/electron/xterm.js && cp node_modules/@xterm/addon-fit/lib/addon-fit.js dist/electron/addon-fit.js
scripts.quality: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
